# Oria Patel Enterprises

> B2B custom sports uniform manufacturer based in Sialkot, Pakistan — the global hub of sports manufacturing. We supply custom sublimated sportswear, boxing gloves, and athletic apparel to clubs, academies, retailers, and distributors worldwide with no minimum order requirement.

## About

Oria Patel Enterprises is a direct manufacturer, not a middleman. All products are manufactured in-house in Sialkot, Punjab, Pakistan. We offer 100% sublimation printing, free design mockups, and fast worldwide delivery. We work with football clubs, boxing gyms, schools, retailers, and bulk importers across Europe, North America, Australia, and the Middle East.

## Contact

- Email: info@oriapatel.com, admin@oriapatel.com
- Phone: +92 311 7337511
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/923117337511
- Address: Sialkot, Punjab, Pakistan
- Response time: Within 24 hours, available 24/7

## Business Details

- Founded: Sialkot, Pakistan
- Specialisation: Custom sublimated sportswear and boxing equipment
- Minimum order: No minimum order quantity
- Services: Free design mockup, worldwide shipping, custom branding, bulk orders
- Certifications: ISO-compliant manufacturing facilities
